verses.book: Jerome's Apology for Himself Against the Books of Rufinus.
verses.text: In the end of your letter you say: “I hope that you love peace.”

verses.book: Jerome's Apology for Himself Against the Books of Rufinus.
verses.text: To this I will answer in a few words: If you desire peace, lay down your arms.

verses.book: Jerome's Apology for Himself Against the Books of Rufinus.
verses.text: I can be at peace with one who shews kindness; I do not fear one who threatens me.

verses.book: Jerome's Apology for Himself Against the Books of Rufinus.
verses.text: Let us be at one in faith, and peace will follow immediately.
